title: Far Frozen
description: Will you be able to survive and escape the frosty, Far Frozen landscape? All cold biomes. Hard early game survival.
body:
# Far Frozen
The world is frozen over. Food is scarce. You cannot get planks easily.

Will you be able to survive the perpetual snow and ice?

## Concepts and Changes
Far Frozen is all about extending the early game, and making it more challenging. Simple things in normal Minecraft are not as easy in this datapack. The process of getting through the stone age has been extended, and copper and iron are now much more scarce, and only in the form of large deposits. There are no diamonds to mine either. You'll have to use your wits to get as far into the game as you can, and build a better world for yourself in the frozen wastes.

### Features:
- Stone Age Extended
- Starter Crafting System for 2x2 Recipes
- Initial Food Sources Dramatically Reduced
- Farming System Tweaked for Slow Expansion
   - Wheat Seeds are a Mystery. Good Luck.
   - I hope you like beets.
- Bonemeal Nerfed Heavily
- Fishing Catch Rate Reduced
- Altered Fishing Loot Tables
- No Villages or Naturally Spawning Zombie Villagers (look for igloos)
- Mob Drops Slightly Tweaked
- Loot Tables Slightly Rebalanced
- Wooden Planks are Cut from a Saw (stonecutter), like in Real Life.
- Crafting Table Requires Iron Ingots
   - (you'll need to locate some pre-smelted iron somewhere.)
- Stonecutter recipe needs 19 total iron. >:)
- Some Recipes Tweaked and Added.
- Secret Recipes! Experiment and be Rewarded.
- There is NO natural diamond ore at ALL, You'll have to source some elsewhere.
- The only copper and iron Sources are from large rare veins.

### Potential Planned Features:
- More Advancements
- More Custom Biomes
- Side Mysteries/Quests to Solve
- Unobtainables like bees will be in end city loot

### Customization
This pack is designed to be a base to build upon for customization. Add in more packs on top to make the game even more challenging or convenient for yourself as you please. For reference, the game is intended to be played on HARD, and have DoInsolmia Set to False. It's highly recommended to add a terrain pack like Tectonic, use AMPLIFIED terrain, or even add a temperature system pack for another layer of challenge.

# **GOOD LUCK!** 
_Your Journey Awaits._
